ocr_findings.description: Chapter sidebar label: image shows '第13章 データベース'; OCR renders '第12章 データベース' — chapter number wrong (13 vs 12).
Heading icon 'コし' in '試験にはコしが出る！' is a stylized logo in the image; OCR renders 'つし' — minor character shape confusion, meaning preserved from context.

reviewer_notes: Page covers排他制御 (exclusive control) with a sequential diagram. The chapter number error (12 vs 13) is a med-severity wrong_char finding but does not affect learning content meaning. All numbered steps 1-6 are fully and correctly captured.
